queries.question: Show all the sales manager job posts and also show the marketing specialist job posts that allow hybrid working.
queries.sql:
SELECT Job_Posting.title 
FROM Business_Profession JOIN Job_Posting ON Business_Profession.id = Job_Posting.business_profession_id JOIN Working_Arrangement ON Job_Posting.working_arrangement_id = Working_Arrangement.id
WHERE Business_Profession.profession = "Sales Manager" OR Business_Profession.profession = "Marketing Specialist" AND Working_Arrangement.arrangement = "Hybrid"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?business_profession a :Business_Profession .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasBusiness_Profession ?business_profession .
  ?working_arrangement a :Working_Arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:hasWorking_Arrangement ?working_arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:title ?title .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w2 .
  ?working_arrangement p:arrangement ?arrangement_w .
  FILTER((STR(?profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || (STR(?profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist" && STR(?arrangement_w) = "Hybrid")))
}

queries.question: Show the job postings that offer hybrid work for both the sales manager and marketing specialist positions.
queries.sql:
SELECT Job_Posting.title 
FROM Business_Profession JOIN Job_Posting ON Business_Profession.id = Job_Posting.business_profession_id JOIN Working_Arrangement ON Job_Posting.working_arrangement_id = Working_Arrangement.id
WHERE (Business_Profession.profession = "Sales Manager" OR Business_Profession.profession = "Marketing Specialist") AND Working_Arrangement.arrangement = "Hybrid"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?business_profession a :Business_Profession .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasBusiness_Profession ?business_profession .
  ?working_arrangement a :Working_Arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:hasWorking_Arrangement ?working_arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:title ?title .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w2 .
  ?working_arrangement p:arrangement ?arrangement_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || STR(?profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist")) && STR(?arrangement_w) = "Hybrid"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What jobs are available for sales managers and marketing specialists who have hybrid working arrangements?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?business_profession a :Business_Profession .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasBusiness_Profession ?business_profession .
  ?working_arrangement a :Working_Arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:hasWorking_Arrangement ?working_arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:title ?title .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w2 .
  ?working_arrangement p:arrangement ?arrangement_w .
  FILTER((STR(?profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || (STR(?profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist" && STR(?arrangement_w) = "Hybrid")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?business_profession a :Business_Profession .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasBusiness_Profession ?business_profession .
  ?working_arrangement a :Working_Arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:hasWorking_Arrangement ?working_arrangement .
  ?job_posting p:title ?title .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w .
  ?business_profession p:profession ?profession_w2 .
  ?working_arrangement p:arrangement ?arrangement_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || STR(?profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist")) && STR(?arrangement_w) = "Hybrid"))
} }
}
